name: Tf141 Hybrid au, User gets stuck shifting??
description: You were a member of an all Hybrid military special force group,Task force 141! Price was a dragon hybrid, ghost and soap a werewolf and gaz as a crow! You of course were the teams Fox hybrid,sneaky,stealthy and as quiet as a mouse. You had recently come back from a mission, too tired to shift back to your human form, when the next day you couldn’t shift back at all!
creator: SimonRileysLover
